en: No, I'm not bad, I'm not a bad player. Shut up, Andy.
ko: 나 나쁜 사람 아니야. 나 나쁜 선수 아니야. 조용히 해, 앤디.

en: It looked like you were pushing away a girl bully.
ko: 여자 괴롭히는 애를 밀어내는 것 같았어.

en: Anyway, it's legendary, it's legendary to play ball down there, so I headed downtown
ko: 어쨌든 전설적이야. 거기서 농구하는 건 전설적이야.

en: for some classic New York street ball and ladies and gentlemen, here's what happened.
ko: 자, 여러분, 무슨 일이 있었는지 보여줄게.

en: Hey guys, can I play? All right.
